ddls:
CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the topic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the topic was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the topic is active or archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic the article belongs to */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the article was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the article was last updated */,
  "is_published" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the article is published */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was published */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source or journal where the article was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the article */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the article has been cited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experts" (
  "expert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expert */,
  "expert_name" TEXT /* Name of the expert */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the expert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the expert was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the expert's information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the expert is active */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Expert's area of specialization */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the expert is affiliated */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the expert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being evaluated */,
  "expert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expert performing the evaluation */,
  "correct_stance" TEXT /* Correctness of the article's stance */,
  "helpful_probability" REAL /* Helpfulness probability of the article */,
  "prediction" INTEGER /* Prediction value for the article */,
  "target" INTEGER /* Target value for the article */,
  "bm25_score" REAL /* BM25 score of the article */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the evaluation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the evaluation was last updated */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or feedback from the expert */,
  "evaluation_status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_expert_id FOREIGN KEY ("expert_id") REFERENCES experts ("expert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metadata" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was performed */,
  "unhelpful_probability" REAL /* Unhelpfulness probability of the article */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_topics" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic the article belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expert_evaluations" (
  "expert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expert */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation performed by the expert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expert_id", "evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_evaluations" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation performed on the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "evaluation_id")
)
